title: Restore all 18 missing comic panels and ensure complete story display

requirements.summary: Add the 18 missing comic panel images to the frontend assets so all panels from the complete story are rendered without gaps
acceptanceCriteria: All 18 previously missing panel images are present in frontend/public/assets/generated
Panel numbering is complete with no gaps in the sequence
All panels load successfully in the ComicViewer component

Review all panel image references in comicData.ts to ensure they correctly reference the newly added panel images (panel-1 through panel-6 and panel-20 through panel-31) with proper asset paths and verify no panels are accidentally excluded from the data structure

requirements.summary: Verify that all chapters from comicData.ts are rendered in the ComicViewer without any chapters being skipped or filtered out
acceptanceCriteria: Every chapter defined in comicData.ts appears in the rendered output
Chapter filtering or exclusion logic (if any exists) is removed
The complete narrative sequence is preserved from start to finish

file_operations.description: Review the chapter rendering logic to ensure all chapters from comicData are included without filtering. Verify the story section renders every chapter in sequence and remove any conditional logic that might skip chapters. Ensure the chapter structure is preserved exactly as defined in comicData.ts

Audit all chapter definitions to confirm every chapter is properly structured and contains valid panel references. Verify no chapters are commented out, conditionally excluded, or missing from the exported chapters array

requirements.summary: Ensure the progressive rendering system in useProgressivePanels displays all panels from the complete story without truncation
acceptanceCriteria: The load-more functionality reveals all remaining panels
No artificial caps prevent displaying the complete panel count
Users can view the entire story from beginning to end

file_operations.description: Review the progressive rendering logic to ensure the visibleCount can grow to encompass the full totalCount without artificial limits. Verify the loadMore function correctly increments visibleCount and the hasMore flag accurately reflects when all panels are displayed. Remove any maximum caps that would prevent showing the complete story

Verify the load-more button implementation correctly passes the total panel count to useProgressivePanels and handles the complete range of panels. Ensure both story panels and credits panels can be fully loaded through progressive rendering. Confirm the UI properly indicates when all panels have been loaded
